raw_description: WiFi CSI人体行为识别，坐站走摔倒挥手，CPU，准确率85%，UT-HAR数据集

agent_decisions.decision: Detected domain=wifi_csi_har, device=cpu, dataset=UT-HAR, actions=[sit,stand,walk,fall,wave], num_classes=5, target_acc=0.85

Validated against domain_profile: UT-HAR standard has 7 classes, user selected 5. wave not in UT-HAR standard set but will be treated as gesture class. Further validation needed during data loading. Constraints: CPU-only, max 0.5M params, max 30ms inference. Training defaults from domain profile: Adam(lr=1e-3), batch_size=32, epochs=50, early_stopping=10.

Selected amplitude_only preprocessing (hampel→bandpass→z-score) + ResNet-1D architecture (0.4M params, ~20ms CPU inference). UT-HAR native 7 classes mapped to 5 target actions (pickup→wave as proxy). Code scaffold generated: train.py, inference.py, requirements.txt.
